text.title: Faion CLI as agent skill — decision tree

decision-tree.root-question: Agent has tool-use loop AND faion-cli is installed/reachable AND a non-anonymous tier credential is configured?

branch.when: tool_use_loop == false OR cli_reachable == false OR tier == 'anonymous'
tool_use_loop == true AND cli_reachable == true AND tier != 'anonymous'
branch.question: Provider format chosen AND budget set ≤ rule r1 caps?

branch.when: provider_chosen == false OR budget.max_calls > 10 OR budget.max_content_tokens > 8000
provider_chosen == true AND budget.max_calls <= 10 AND budget.max_content_tokens <= 8000
branch.question: Dispatcher implements cache (r4) + PII strip (r5) + logging (r6)?

branch.when: cache == true AND pii_strip == true AND logging == true
cache == false OR pii_strip == false OR logging == false

example.trace: anthropic SDK + geek tier + budget {3,2000} + cache/strip/log all true -> run-the-checklist
